  [38;5;231mSliding Window. The user wants to add a Distributed Rate Limiting strategy, implemented in-memory. Since "distributed"[39m
  [38;5;231musually implies multiple nodes, I'll implement a shared in-memory store to simulate this. I also need to check[39m
  [38;5;183mratelimiter.go[38;5;231m for the [38;5;183mRateLimitAlgorithm[38;5;231m type definition and add [38;5;183mRateLimitAlgorithmDistributed[38;5;231m.[39m
